name: Disintegration Bolt
description:
Activate (1 Action) (manipulate)

The shaft of this bolt is scorched and blackened, and handling it coats your fingers with a fine black powder. When an activated disintegration bolt hits a target, it is subject to a Disintegrate spell requiring a DC 34 Fortitude check save. As with the spell, a critical hit on the attack roll causes the target's saving throw outcome to be one degree worse.

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of disintegrate.
